name: codex-sol-fusion
description: Sol Max directs dynamic, task-shaped Luna, Terra, and Sol Codex subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Sol Max directs dynamic task-shaped workers.
interface.longDescription: Keeps GPT-5.6 Sol at max in the main session as planner, subagent controller, consequential decision maker, and final authority while dynamically routing bounded work to pinned Luna, Terra, or Sol Codex subagents.
defaultPrompt: Keep GPT-5.6 Sol at max in the main session and decompose every request into task-shaped lanes before acting.
Have main-session Sol clarify material ambiguity, decide, dynamically launch and control pinned Luna, Terra, or Sol Codex subagents, and retain every consequential decision and final acceptance.
Select Q0-Q3 risk-based QA; for an already-green remote SHA, use Q1 deploy-fast release evidence instead of duplicate local QA, then verify the ledger, workspace, and Sol acceptance before closing.
